subcodes.first_line: Divine verses have been revealed in such profusion that none save His sanctified Essence is capable of enumerating them, and sublime, wondrous Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشانی آیات الهی نازل که احدی بر احصای آن جز ذات مقدسش قادر نه و الواح منیعه بدیعه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @the power of words; of speech, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @call to action
